harness.status.description: Return current project and active task status card.

harness.intake.description: Create or resume a task and classify user request.

harness.next.description: Return next action and instruction bundle.

harness.prepare_write.description: Check scope, approval, baseline, and capability before write-capable work.

harness.user_decision.description: Record approval, denial, acceptance, rejection, scope confirmation, or reconcile decision.

harness.record_change.description: Register changed files, commands, logs, diff, and checkpoint artifacts.

harness.finish_direct.description: Finish or escalate a direct task and create DIRECT-RESULT.

harness.finish_implementation.description: Finish work implementation run, create RUN-SUMMARY, and move to verification.

harness.launch_verify.description: Create a verification run or manual verification bundle.

harness.record_eval.description: Record evaluator verdict and create EVAL.

harness.close_task.description: Close a task after completion conditions pass.
